data.name: id
data.description: The nine-digit student number on page 1

data.name: before_g2_goal
data.description: The handwritten response to the Goal on page 5.

data.name: before_g2_input
data.description: The handwritten response to the input on page 5 answers the question of describing each input parameter.

data.name: before_g2_output
data.description: The handwritten response to the output on page 5.

data.name: before_g2_ac
data.description: The acceptance criteria of the system before the requirement change on page 6. Extract the list of up to 6 handwritten responses.

data.name: before_g2_constraints
data.description: The constraints and assumptions of the system before the requirement change on page 6. Extract a list of up to 6  handwritten responses.

data.name: before_g2_p_1
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 1 on page 7, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g2_p_2
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 2 on page 7, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g2_p_3
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 3 on page 7, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g2_p_4
data.description: prediction question 4 before the requirement change on page 7. Extract the number written in empty space.

data.name: before_g2_p_5
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 5 on page 7, titled prediction sheet.  The option is one or more of the ones in the possible values and has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g2_p_6
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 6 on page 8.  The option has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g2_p_7
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 7 on page 8. The option has a mark next to it in the document.

data.name: before_g2_p_8
data.description: Extract the selected option to question 8 on page 8. The option has a mark next to it in the document.
